messages.content: rewirte：This provision is a standard term in the contract .This is mainly due to the need for daily school publicity, where the school often needs to use videos and images with employees, but these materials are all filmed during working hours and in public.

This clause is a customary condition found in the contract. Its inclusion is primarily driven by the requirement for regular promotion of the school, necessitating the use of photographs and videos featuring employees. As these materials are typically captured during working hours and in public settings, it is important to address this aspect in the contract.
重写：The decision to freeze salary adjustments for all employees is based on the overall operational situation of the school and is not a decision targeted at individual employees.
The implementation of the salary freeze for all employees is guided by the global operational circumstances affecting the school, rather than singling out specific individuals.
rewrite: The decision to freeze salary adjustments for all employees is based on the overall operational situation of the school and is not a decision targeted at individual employees.
The decision to impose a salary freeze for all employees is rooted in the school's comprehensive operational circumstances and is not intended to single out any individual employee.

rewrite：This provision is a standard term in the contract. It is highly uncommon for the school to request staff to work in the school’s affiliated companies unless there is a relocation taking place, which at the current stage, we do not foresee any possibility in this.

This clause is a customary provision in the contract. It is extremely rare for the school to require its staff to work in its affiliated companies, unless there are circumstances of relocation, which, currently, we do not anticipate happening.
rewrite: 1.	Teaching staff are only entitled to summer and winter vacations. Paid annual leave is only applicable to non-academic staff.
1. The allocation of summer and winter vacations is limited to teaching staff. Non-academic staff members are eligible for paid annual leave.

rewrite: 2.	This provision is a standard term in the contract. The school will make efforts to inform relevant staff in advance of any activities. However, if there are urgent activities that require attendance or support, the school will still consult employees before proceeding further.

2. This clause is a customary provision in the contract. The school will endeavor to provide advance notice to relevant staff members regarding any activities. Nevertheless, if there are urgent activities that necessitate attendance or support, the school will consult with employees before proceeding.

rewrite: This stipulation refers specifically to staff who are absent without a valid reason. Being absent from work for three days can be considered a serious matter in practical terms. Staff members are required to apply for leave and clarify their reasons for taking leave through platforms such as MSN or WeChat, which are acceptable to the School.

This provision specifically pertains to staff members who are absent from work without a valid reason. From a practical standpoint, being absent for three consecutive days is regarded as a significant issue. Employees are expected to submit leave applications and state their reasons for taking leave using platforms such as MSN or WeChat, which the School deems acceptable.
rewrite: (3)	This rarely happen, and it really happen, the school shall provide relevant evident to support its claim.
(3) This occurrence is highly uncommon, and if it does happen, the school will furnish appropriate evidence to substantiate its assertion.
rewrite: (3)	This rarely happen, and it really happen, the school shall provide relevant evident to support its claim.
(3) While this situation is infrequent, if it does indeed occur, the school will be required to furnish relevant evidence in order to substantiate its claim.
rewrite: 2.	The school has extended it to 60 days is mainly due to the special nature of education industry, which  is a common practice among international schools.
2. The decision to extend it to 60 days is primarily driven by the unique characteristics of the education industry, which is a customary practice among international schools.

rewrite: I previously heard that it is up to employee's choice, but I gather recently the new regulations are it is compulsory for employer to include social insurance for all expat teachers. I suggest you. could ask Cherry when you drop by at three

I had heard earlier that it was optional for employees, but I have recently learned that the new regulations require all expat teachers to be covered by social insurance, which is mandatory for employers. I recommend that you ask Cherry about this when you visit at three o'clock.
can you rewrite and be less upfront: 3.	Unfortunately, we have to decline this reques
I apologize, but we are unable to fulfill this request at this time.
can you rewrite and be less upfront:OK. However, the gratuity amount will be reduced (50% less than the current contract)
Certainly, there will be a reduction in the gratuity amount in this case. Specifically, it will be 50% less than what is stated in the current contract.

rewrite with less unfront attitude: I hope this email finds you well. As a member of HR team, I want to express our heartfelt gratitude for your dedication and commitment to our institution. Your hard work and expertise have been invaluable to the growth and development of our school. We fully recognize that the well-being of our employees is intricately linked to the progress of our institution. The rights and obligations of both the school and its employees are paramount, and we strive to treat all employees fairly, with the expectation that we can grow together.

Regarding your queries raised last week, we have meticulously discussed and provided responses to each of your concerns. Please find the attached document for a detailed overview of our responses. We hope that the information provided will clarify matters and address any misunderstandings you may have had.

We understand that the feedback may not have fully met your expectations, and we appreciate your honesty in sharing your thoughts. We value your input and feedback as it helps us improve.

If, after reading the attached document, you have any further questions or would like to discuss matters further, please do not hesitate to contact us. We can schedule a meeting at your convenience to discuss any outstanding issues or concerns you may have. Thank you once again for your feedback. We value your input and are always open to suggestions for improvement.

Dear [Employee's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. First and foremost, as a member of the HR team, I would like to express our heartfelt appreciation for your dedication and commitment to our institution. Your hard work and expertise have played a crucial role in the growth and development of our school. We deeply understand that the well-being of our employees is intricately linked to the progress of our institution.

In our organization, we hold the rights and obligations of both the school and its employees in high regard, and we prioritize treating all employees fairly. We believe that fostering a positive working environment will allow us to grow together as a team.

Regarding the queries you raised last week, we have thoroughly discussed and provided detailed responses to each of your concerns. For more specific information, please refer to the attached document that outlines our responses. Our aim is to ensure that the information provided clarifies the matters at hand and resolves any misunderstandings that may have arisen.

We wholeheartedly understand that the feedback may not have fully met your expectations, and we appreciate your candor in sharing your thoughts with us. Your input and feedback are highly valued as they aid us in continuously improving and refining our processes.

If, after reviewing the attached document, you have any further questions or would like to discuss any outstanding concerns you may have, please do not hesitate to reach out to us. We would be more than willing to schedule a meeting at your convenience to delve deeper into the issues at hand. Once again, we would like to extend our gratitude for your feedback, as it has helped us identify areas where we can enhance our practices.

Thank you for your ongoing commitment to our institution, and we remain open to suggestions for improvement.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team
